tasks.subject: [sidebar-upgrade-notification] [P1] Create SidebarUpgradeCard component with tests
tasks.description:
Create a new `SidebarUpgradeCard` component that renders a dismissible upgrade notification card in the sidebar footer area.

## File to Create

`apps/client/src/layers/features/session-list/ui/SidebarUpgradeCard.tsx`

## Props Interface

```typescript
interface SidebarUpgradeCardProps {
  currentVersion: string;
  latestVersion: string;
  isFeature: boolean;
  onDismiss: (version: string) => void;
}
```

## Implementation Details

The card is a self-contained component rendered above the footer bar when an upgrade is available and not dismissed.

### Constants

```typescript
const UPDATE_COMMAND = 'npm update -g dorkos';
const RELEASES_URL = 'https://github.com/dork-labs/dorkos/releases';
```

### Card Layout

- Header row: `ArrowUp` icon (from lucide-react) + version delta text (`v{currentVersion} → v{latestVersion}`) + dismiss X button (lucide `X` icon)
- Description line: "New features available" when `isFeature` is true, "Patch update available" when false
- Action row:
  - Copy button: copies `npm update -g dorkos` to clipboard using `navigator.clipboard.writeText()`. Shows `Clipboard` icon normally, switches to `Check` icon briefly (use `TIMING.COPY_FEEDBACK_MS` from `@/layers/shared/lib/constants` with `setTimeout`). Use `useState<boolean>(false)` for the copied state.
  - "What's new" link: `<a>` tag opening `https://github.com/dork-labs/dorkos/releases` in a new tab (`target="_blank"`, `rel="noopener noreferrer"`). Only visible when `isFeature` is true. Shows `ExternalLink` icon.

### Styling

- Outer wrapper: `mx-2 mb-1 rounded-md border p-3`
- Feature update variant: add `border-amber-500/20 bg-amber-500/5`
- Patch update variant: add `border-border bg-muted/50`
- Use `cn()` from `@/layers/shared/lib` to conditionally apply variant classes based on `isFeature` prop
- Header text: `text-sm font-medium`
- Description: `text-muted-foreground text-xs`
- Dismiss button: `text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground` with appropriate aria-label

### Animation

Wrap the entire card in a `motion.div` (from `motion/react`) with:
- `initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 8 }}`
- `animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}`
- `exit={{ opacity: 0, y: 8 }}`
- `transition={{ duration: 0.2 }}`

The parent component will wrap this in `<AnimatePresence>` for mount/unmount animation.

### Imports

```typescript
import { useState, useCallback } from 'react';
import { motion } from 'motion/react';
import { ArrowUp, Clipboard, Check, ExternalLink, X } from 'lucide-react';
import { cn } from '@/layers/shared/lib';
import { TIMING } from '@/layers/shared/lib/constants';
```

### Accessibility

- Dismiss button: `aria-label="Dismiss upgrade notification"`
- Copy button: `aria-label="Copy update command"`
- "What's new" link: standard link semantics with external link icon

## Test File to Create

`apps/client/src/layers/features/session-list/ui/__tests__/SidebarUpgradeCard.test.tsx`

Add `// @vitest-environment jsdom` at the top.

### Test Cases

1. **Renders version delta correctly** — render with `currentVersion="1.2.3"` and `latestVersion="1.4.0"`, assert text contains `v1.2.3` and `v1.4.0` with arrow between them
2. **Shows "New features available" for feature updates** — render with `isFeature={true}`, assert `screen.getByText('New features available')`
3. **Shows "Patch update available" for patch updates** — render with `isFeature={false}`, assert `screen.getByText('Patch update available')`
4. **Copy button copies update command** — mock `navigator.clipboard.writeText` as `vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined)`, click copy button, assert `writeText` called with `'npm update -g dorkos'`
5. **Copy button shows check icon after click** — click copy button, assert check icon appears (by aria-label change or icon presence)
6. **"What's new" link visible for feature updates** — render with `isFeature={true}`, assert link with text "What's new" exists and has correct `href`
7. **"What's new" link hidden for patch updates** — render with `isFeature={false}`, assert no "What's new" link in DOM
8. **Dismiss button calls onDismiss with version** — provide `onDismiss` spy, click dismiss button, assert called with `latestVersion`
9. **Feature card has amber styling** — render with `isFeature={true}`, check container has classes `border-amber-500/20` and `bg-amber-500/5`
10. **Patch card has muted styling** — render with `isFeature={false}`, check container has classes `border-border` and `bg-muted/50`

### Mock Setup

```typescript
beforeEach(() => {
  vi.clearAllMocks();
  Object.assign(navigator, {
    clipboard: { writeText: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined) },
  });
});
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- Component renders correctly for both feature and patch update variants
- Copy button writes correct command to clipboard and shows feedback
- "What's new" link only appears for feature updates
- Dismiss calls `onDismiss` with the latest version string
- All 10 tests pass
- File is under 100 lines

tasks.subject: [sidebar-upgrade-notification] [P2] Remove VersionItem from ChatStatusSection and delete VersionItem files
tasks.description:
Remove all VersionItem rendering from `ChatStatusSection`, delete the `VersionItem` component and its test file, and remove the VersionItem export from the status feature barrel.

## Files to Delete

1. `apps/client/src/layers/features/status/ui/VersionItem.tsx` (183 lines)
2. `apps/client/src/layers/features/status/ui/__tests__/VersionItem.test.tsx`

## File to Modify: ChatStatusSection.tsx

`apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/ui/ChatStatusSection.tsx`

### Remove from imports

Remove `VersionItem` from the status feature import line. The import currently looks like:
```typescript
import {
  ...
  VersionItem,
  ...
} from '@/layers/features/status';
```
Remove only `VersionItem` from this destructured import. Keep all other imports.

### Remove from useAppStore destructuring

Remove these two entries from the `useAppStore()` destructuring (around line 140):
```typescript
showStatusBarVersion,
setShowStatusBarVersion,
```

### Remove dismissedVersions memo

Remove this block (around lines 158-161):
```typescript
const dismissedVersions = useMemo(
  () => serverConfig?.dismissedUpgradeVersions ?? [],
  [serverConfig?.dismissedUpgradeVersions]
);
```

### Remove handleDismissVersion callback

Remove this block (around lines 163-170):
```typescript
const handleDismissVersion = useCallback(
  async (version: string) => {
    const updated = [...dismissedVersions, version];
    await transport.updateConfig({ ui: { dismissedUpgradeVersions: updated } });
    queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['config'] });
  },
  [dismissedVersions, transport, queryClient]
);
```

### Remove the version StatusLine.Item block

Remove the entire version item block from the JSX (around lines 353-373). It looks like:
```tsx
<StatusLine.Item itemKey="version" visible={showStatusBarVersion && !!serverConfig}>
  <ItemContextMenu
    itemLabel={getItemLabel('version')}
    onHide={() => setShowStatusBarVersion(false)}
    onConfigure={() => setConfigureOpen(true)}
  >
    {serverConfig && (
      <VersionItem
        version={serverConfig.version}
        latestVersion={serverConfig.latestVersion}
        isDevMode={serverConfig.isDevMode}
        isDismissed={dismissedVersions.includes(serverConfig.latestVersion ?? '')}
        onDismiss={handleDismissVersion}
      />
    )}
  </ItemContextMenu>
</StatusLine.Item>
```

Keep the `useQuery('config')` call — it is used by other status bar items.

### Remove unused imports

After removing the above code, check if `useMemo` is still needed (it likely is for other memos). If `dismissedVersions` was the only `useMemo`, remove it from the React import. Similarly check if `useCallback` is still needed.

## File to Modify: status/index.ts

`apps/client/src/layers/features/status/index.ts`

Remove this line:
```typescript
export { VersionItem } from './ui/VersionItem';
```

Keep `isNewer` and `isFeatureUpdate` exports — they are still used by `SidebarFooterBar`.

## Test Files to Update

### ChatPanel.test.tsx

`apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/__tests__/ChatPanel.test.tsx`

Remove any `vi.mock` for `VersionItem` if present. Search for `VersionItem` references and remove them.

### ChatStatusSection-configure.test.tsx

`apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/__tests__/ChatStatusSection-configure.test.tsx`

Remove any references to `showStatusBarVersion`. This may include:
- Mock store properties
- Test cases that assert version toggle behavior
- Expectations about version visibility

## Acceptance Criteria

- `VersionItem.tsx` and `VersionItem.test.tsx` are deleted from disk
- `VersionItem` is no longer exported from `status/index.ts`
- `ChatStatusSection` no longer renders any version-related content
- `ChatStatusSection` still renders all other status bar items correctly
- `dismissedVersions` and `handleDismissVersion` are removed from `ChatStatusSection`
- No TypeScript compilation errors (run `pnpm typecheck`)
- All remaining tests pass
tasks.activeForm: Removing VersionItem from ChatStatusSection and deleting component files

tasks.subject: [sidebar-upgrade-notification] [P2] Remove showStatusBarVersion from app store and status bar registry
tasks.description:
Remove the `showStatusBarVersion` state/setter from the app store and remove the `version` entry from the status bar registry. Update all affected test files.

## File to Modify: app-store.ts

`apps/client/src/layers/shared/model/app-store.ts`

### Remove from state type (around line 127-128)

Remove:
```typescript
showStatusBarVersion: boolean;
setShowStatusBarVersion: (v: boolean) => void;
```

### Remove from BOOL_KEYS map (around line 188)

Remove:
```typescript
showStatusBarVersion: 'dorkos-show-status-bar-version',
```

### Remove from initial state (around line 214)

Remove:
```typescript
showStatusBarVersion: true,
```

### Remove setter implementation (around lines 409-412)

Remove the setter block:
```typescript
showStatusBarVersion: readBool(BOOL_KEYS.showStatusBarVersion, true),
// and the setter:
writeBool(BOOL_KEYS.showStatusBarVersion, v);
set({ showStatusBarVersion: v });
```

The exact shape varies, but search for all `showStatusBarVersion` references in the file and remove them.

## File to Modify: status-bar-registry.ts

`apps/client/src/layers/features/status/model/status-bar-registry.ts`

### Remove from StatusBarItemKey union type

Remove `'version'` from the union:
```typescript
// Before:
export type StatusBarItemKey =
  | 'cwd'
  | ...
  | 'version';

// After:
export type StatusBarItemKey =
  | 'cwd'
  | ...
  | 'tunnel';
```

### Remove from STATUS_BAR_REGISTRY array

Remove this entry:
```typescript
{ key: 'version', label: 'Version', description: 'Update available indicator', group: 'system', icon: ArrowUpCircle, defaultVisible: true },
```

### Remove ArrowUpCircle import

Remove `ArrowUpCircle` from the lucide-react import since it is only used by the version registry entry.

### useStatusBarVisibility hook

No code change needed in the hook itself — it dynamically builds property names from the registry key. Since `'version'` is removed from `StatusBarItemKey`, TypeScript will prevent passing it. The hook continues to work for all remaining keys.

## Test Files to Update

### StatusBarConfigureContent.test.tsx

`apps/client/src/layers/features/status/__tests__/StatusBarConfigureContent.test.tsx`

- Remove any test expectations that reference "Version" as a toggle label
- Update any item count assertions (e.g., if a test checks `expect(toggles).toHaveLength(11)`, change to `10`)
- Remove any mock store entries for `showStatusBarVersion`

### status-bar-registry.test.ts

`apps/client/src/layers/features/status/__tests__/status-bar-registry.test.ts`

- Remove test cases that specifically test the `'version'` registry entry
- Update registry size assertions (e.g., `expect(STATUS_BAR_REGISTRY).toHaveLength(11)` becomes `10`)
- Remove any tests for `useStatusBarVisibility('version')`

### status-bar-integration.test.tsx

`apps/client/src/layers/features/status/__tests__/status-bar-integration.test.tsx`

- Remove references to version visibility (e.g., `showStatusBarVersion` in mock stores)
- Remove any assertions about version items being visible/hidden

## Acceptance Criteria

- `showStatusBarVersion` and `setShowStatusBarVersion` no longer exist in the app store
- `'version'` is no longer in the `StatusBarItemKey` union type
- The version entry is removed from `STATUS_BAR_REGISTRY`
- `ArrowUpCircle` import is removed from `status-bar-registry.ts`
- The StatusBarConfigureContent popover no longer shows a "Version" toggle
- `resetStatusBarPreferences()` no longer tries to reset a version preference
- All test files updated with correct counts and no version references
- No TypeScript compilation errors
- All remaining tests pass
tasks.activeForm: Removing showStatusBarVersion from app store and status bar registry

tasks.subject: [sidebar-upgrade-notification] [P3] Run full verification suite (tests, typecheck, lint)
tasks.description:
Run the complete verification suite to confirm the migration is clean with no regressions.

## Steps

### 1. Run full test suite

```bash
pnpm test -- --run
```

All tests must pass. Pay particular attention to:
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/session-list/__tests__/SidebarFooterBar.test.tsx` — new version display tests
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/session-list/ui/__tests__/SidebarUpgradeCard.test.tsx` — new component tests
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/__tests__/ChatStatusSection-configure.test.tsx` — version references removed
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/__tests__/ChatPanel.test.tsx` — VersionItem mock removed
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/status/__tests__/StatusBarConfigureContent.test.tsx` — version toggle removed
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/status/__tests__/status-bar-registry.test.ts` — version entry removed
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/status/__tests__/status-bar-integration.test.tsx` — version references removed

### 2. Run type check

```bash
pnpm typecheck
```

Must pass with zero errors. Key things that could fail:
- `ChatStatusSection` referencing removed `showStatusBarVersion` or `VersionItem`
- `status-bar-registry.ts` still using `ArrowUpCircle` or `'version'` key
- `app-store.ts` still referencing removed properties
- Any other file importing `VersionItem` from `@/layers/features/status`

### 3. Run lint

```bash
pnpm lint
```

Must pass with zero errors. Check for:
- Unused imports left behind after removals
- Missing TSDoc on new exported component (`SidebarUpgradeCard`)
- FSD layer violations (the import from `@/layers/features/status` in `SidebarFooterBar` is allowed per FSD rules — UI composition across sibling features is permitted)

### 4. Verify no dead references

Search the codebase for any remaining references to:
- `VersionItem` (should only appear in git history, not in source)
- `showStatusBarVersion` (should be fully removed)
- `setShowStatusBarVersion` (should be fully removed)

If any references remain, they indicate an incomplete migration and must be cleaned up.

## Acceptance Criteria

- `pnpm test -- --run` passes with zero failures
- `pnpm typecheck` passes with zero errors
- `pnpm lint` passes with zero errors
- No remaining references to `VersionItem`, `showStatusBarVersion`, or `setShowStatusBarVersion` in source code
- Net line count change is approximately -190 lines (290 added, 480 removed)
tasks.activeForm: Running full verification suite across tests, typecheck, and lint
